attributes.action: Ban knife carrying in public with zero exceptions.
attributes.additional_details: Currently certain groups of our community can carry a knife because of thier religious belief or as part of a traditional costume. Then only when these knives are used will they be defined as offence weapons which is “after the horse has bolted” approach. The current policy promotes a culture of carrying knifes for defence reason because other can carry.
attributes.background: Ban all knife carrying in public without exception for religious's or ceremonial purposes.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: “Ban carrying religious, cultural & ceremonial bladed & pointed items in public” https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/770412
